Productivity improvement toolkit for Ewoq raters. Toolkit includes the following features:

1. Url Autolauncher: Automatically launch urls on a new task load and close urls from the previous task
* On each task load, the extension will launch the url in a new tab automatically and close the tab from the previous task. As part of task load, the extension closes the previously opened Snipit tabs.

2. Snipit Autopaste: Automatically paste snipit links to the rating task whenever a snipit is captured. 
* For each new Snipit page load, automatically copies the snipit url link on the task where the field is marked with "snipit_autopaste"

3. Capture live task reviewed Url and autopaste: On a new task load, capture the url of the reviewed entity. This could be the same url as the request or it could be a redirect. Automatically pastes the url in the task for post processing. The field marked with "review_url_autopaste" is used to paste the live reviewed url. Captures the first page complete or loading event only to restrict overriding by future url loads

4. Handle Chrome pre-rendering for review urls and mark them for closure. Also paste them in the task if the final review url is requested.

Introducing 'Hide Me' – an innovative browser extension designed to protect your privacy. This unique tool is designed to protect your online interactions, automatically blurring your feed when someone is behind you, thereby protecting your personal information from prying eyes. With 'Hide Me,' the extension focuses on user-friendly features and activates seamlessly, providing a discreet layer of protection without affecting your browsing experience. Now you can engage on social media without worrying about your audience and make sure your online world remains private. You can scroll freely through any websites feed without worry because by hiding Page, you control who sees your screen and add an extra layer of security to your digital presence.

Disclaimer:
This extension is NOT made by Google, it was made by AYMEN DEV (DEVELOPER).

For Donation:

or

Displays a warning when you are about to visit a URL that contains basic auth credentials, to help prevent phishing attacks.

Displays a warning when you are about to visit a URL that contains basic auth credentials, to help prevent phishing attacks. 

Clicking on a link to a URL like example.com@something.zip would take you to a website with the domain something.zip, which may not be what you expect, and may allow an attacker to conduct a phishing attack by imitating example.com. This extension should display a warning when this is happening, and may help prevent that. Of course, it is not a guarantee, and you are still responsible for your own security.
This Chrome browser extension provides support for activating links and other HTML elements using voice commands.

Click by Voice numbers each clickable or focusable item at all times and allows activating them via keyboard.  For example, to open a link numbered 13 in a new window, you could manually hit control shift space then type "13:w" into the resulting pop-up then hit enter.  In practice, a voice command like "window pick 1 3" would be used to type these keys.  

WARNING: this extension by itself provides no voice functionality; procurement of the needed voice commands is the user's responsibility. One recommended means of doing this is to use Vocola (http://vocola.net/). 

Supported functionality includes focusing input elements, clicking elements, opening links in the same tab/a new (focused) tab/a new window, and removing the keyboard focus from the current element.  For how to use Click by Voice, see https://github.com/mdbridge/click-by-voice/blob/master/README.md.  CbV provides functionality similar to that of Firefox's mouseless browsing extension for voice control.
MyCache automatically stores saved copies of the pages you visit.

MyCache is a Chrome extension for saving copies of the pages you visit automatically or on request for offline viewing.
It also provides a user interface for viewing all pages stored in the filesystem.

By using MyCache you agree to the terms of use and privacy policy (https://github.com/msindwan/msindwan.github.io/wiki/MyCache-Terms-of-Use-and-Privacy-Policy)

MyCache does not send your data to the vendor or any third-party vendors. All files are saved on your desktop. If saving all files by default, please make sure to keep sensitive files saved by MyCache safe and secure.
Δες γρήγορα την ελάχιστη, τη μέγιστη και τη μέση χαμηλότερη τιμή που είχε ένα προϊόν στο Skroutz.gr!

Αποποίηση ευθύνης: 
Η χρήση της συγκεκριμένης επέκτασης γίνεται αποκλειστικά και μόνο με δική σας ευθύνη. Ο δημιουργός δεν ευθύνεται σε καμία περίπτωση για τυχόν παραβιάσεις όρων χρήσης του skroutz.gr. 

Ο σκοπός αυτής της επέκτασης είναι να βλέπεις γρήγορα την ελάχιστη, τη μέγιστη και τη μέση χαμηλότερη τιμή που είχε ένα προϊόν στο skroutz.gr, χωρίς να ψάχνεις με το ποντίκι στο διάγραμμα.

Αφού την εγκαταστήσεις, με κάθε προϊόν θα εμφανίζεται αυτόματα:
• η ελάχιστη και η μέγιστη χαμηλότερη τιμή που είχε το προϊόν στο skroutz.gr τα τελευταία δύο χρόνια
• η μέση χαμηλότερη τιμή που είχε το προϊόν τον τελευταίο μήνα στο skroutz.gr 
• η χαμηλότερη τιμή που έχει σήμερα στο skroutz.gr
• ένα μικρό slider με τους παραπάνω αριθμούς σε μια σειρά

Έτσι, χωρίς να χάνεις χρόνο σε διαγράμματα, μπορείς με μια ματιά να καταλάβεις αν το προϊόν που κοιτάς αξίζει να το αγοράσεις αμέσως ή όχι.

Αν βέβαια θες να δεις κάτι πιο αναλυτικά, όπως την τιμή πριν 1 χρόνο, τότε φυσικά η επέκταση δε θα σε βοηθήσει. Σε αυτές τις περιπτώσεις θα πρέπει να βλέπεις κανονικά το διάγραμμα.

Η παρούσα επέκταση δε σχετίζεται σε καμία περίπτωση με την εταιρία Skroutz.gr.

Ξόδεψα πολύ χρόνο για τη δημιουργία αυτής της δωρεάν επέκτασης. Αν σου άρεσε και θέλεις να με υποστηρίξεις, μπορείς να το κάνεις με μια δωρεά στο παρακάτω λινκ:
https://www.paypal.com/donate/?hosted_button_id=BTK97P92ZF29U

You can block unwanted users or channels on YouTube, social media, and communities.

Main function:
You can block users' post or channels on SNS by simply right-clicking their posts.

Features:
- Right-click on unwanted user IDs, posts, or articles to access a blocking menu.
- Manually enter user IDs to block.
- Easily unblock users at any time.
- Customize the appearance of blocked content:
   . Replace it with a simple countdown timer (e.g., 100 days until exam, 29 days until payday).
   . Display basic information about the blocked user.
   . Remove blocked content completely.
- Export and import block lists as files for easy sharing and backup.

You can quickly reach the activity page as well as the floor page from a single asset, or from other parts of the asset search pages.

Also included in this extension is the ability to use keyboard shortcuts to reach certain collection related pages as follows:

A - Activity page
C - Collection page
F - Floor page
Plays sounds when starting or finishing navigation or a download, when typing on a website, or when opening or closing a tab.

Do you remember the classic sounds of the old Internet Explorer when clicking, when a page finished loading, or when a download completed? This extension brings those sounds back and adds other events, such as when typing in a text field or opening and closing a tab. In the options window, you can activate, deactivate, and customize the sounds to your liking.

𝗡𝗲𝘄 𝗙𝗲𝗮𝘁𝘂𝗿𝗲𝘀:

	v 2.1
		· Added the options page, where you can enable or disable events and customize sounds.
		· Default setting changed to disabled for keypress sound
		· Added events for opening and closing tabs.

	v 2.0
		· Mandatory update to Manifest 3.0 (which is more restrictive with sound playback).
		· Added the event for typing in a text field.

𝐈𝐦𝐩𝐨𝐫𝐭𝐚𝐧𝐭 𝐧𝐨𝐭𝐞:

Information about automatic sound playback:

Due to Chrome's policies, extensions that attempt to play sound automatically may not work properly. The most effective solution I've found is to close all Chrome instances and start the browser with this setting:

	chrome.exe --autoplay-policy=no-user-gesture-required

...or if you use Edge:

	msedge.exe --autoplay-policy=no-user-gesture-required

This allows any page, including this extension, to play sounds without user interaction. However, keep in mind that this setting removes restrictions for all websites, which may result in unexpected behavior on sites with unwanted automatic sound.

For more details, check Chrome's official documentation:
https://developer.chrome.com/blog/autoplay#developer_switches

It’s also important to note that sound cards, after a period of inactivity, often enter power-saving mode. Since the sounds in this extension are very short, they may not be heard immediately at first.

𝗞𝗲𝗲𝗽 𝘁𝗵𝗶𝘀 𝗲𝘅𝘁𝗲𝗻𝘀𝗶𝗼𝗻 𝗮𝗹𝗶𝘃𝗲!!

I develop it in my free time and without ads. If you like it and want to see further improvements, a donation is the best way to support it. Thank you!

	https://paypal.me/navigationalsounds
Redirects Google search results to YouTube videos

Simple browser extension to redirect YouTube videos being opened embed in Google Search to YouTube directly. Supports opening in a new tab and go back to Google Search with the back button.

In addition, the extension also adds a YouTube button on the Google Search results page, allowing you to quickly and easily redirect your search query to YouTube.

No configuration needed, just install and enjoy !

This project is entirely open source and can be found here : https://github.com/Drarox/GoogleYoutubeRedirect

Get cashback on your online purchases

💸 Backify: Smarter Shopping, Real Rewards
Backify is the ultimate cashback extension that helps you save money effortlessly while shopping online.

No more searching for deals. Backify brings them straight to you.

🛍️ Upgrade your online shopping experience
The Backify browser extension automatically alerts you when cashback is available on the sites you love.

Just shop as usual, and when a deal is live, we'll prompt you to activate it with a single click. Simple. Seamless. Smart.

💡 How does Backify offer cashback?
We partner with thousands of top brands. When you shop through Backify, we earn a commission and we share it with you as cashback.
It's a win-win: you save money, and brands get happy customers.

🔔 Never miss a cashback opportunity
Our real time notifications ensure you never miss out. When you see the prompt, just click "Activate" and continue shopping. We'll handle the rest in the background.

💸 Flexible payout options
Withdraw your cashback your way:

* PayPal 💰
* Cryptocurrency (BTC, ETH, and more)

We're constantly expanding our payout methods to suit your lifestyle, whether you're stacking cash or building your digital asset portfolio.

🔒 Your privacy matters
Your data stays your data. We never sell or share your personal information with third parties. Ever.
A Chrome extension to boost the audio of YouTube videos.

Turn up the volume on those quiet Youtube videos with Youtube Audio Booster! Don't let low audio ruin your viewing experience ever again. This must-have browser extension amplifies sound on Youtube videos by up to 500% with the click of a button, making even the faintest whispers crystal clear.

Whether the video was poorly recorded or you're struggling to hear it on laptop speakers, Youtube Audio Booster has your back. It's like giving a megaphone to those mumblers and whisperers! The intelligent volume enhancement technology brings voices out of the background without any audio distortion.

Why keep suffering through videos you can barely hear? Download Youtube Audio Booster now and hear every word! Turn those low whispers into roaring clarity. Dial up the volume on your favorite videos with individual customization. This simple but powerful audio booster will revolutionize how you watch Youtube.

Stop missing out on what's being said and install Youtube Audio Booster today. You'll wonder how you ever watched Youtube without it!

Video playback controls via a popup, keyboard shortcuts, or your phone as a remote control.

For when a video has no controls, but you want to pause, skip backward, etc. Or when you want to skip more or less than the standard 10 seconds. This extension gives you full control over any video on almost any website.

Also useful for very long videos like lectures or stream vods when you want to speed up or skip over the boring bits.

- Click the extension's icon to open the controls.
- Add whatever buttons you want for controlling speed/time/volume.
- Video controls can detach onto the webpage for easier access (shortcut is 'Alt+V'). Or into a separate window ('Alt+Shift+V').
- If you have a mouse, use the scroll wheel to click the buttons (scroll up to go forward/faster/louder, down for the opposite).
- Or use keyboard shortcuts which can be enabled in the settings.
- If there are multiple videos on a page, the controls target the last video played

Every website is different so it won't always work perfectly, but it should work well 95% of the time.

It works on audio players too.

You can now use your phone as a remote control - click 'enable remotes' in the popup and scan the QR code.

Other info:
 - click a video in the video-control bar to scroll it into view
 - it really works best when you use the scroll wheel
 - click the help icon in the popup's settings for more info
PageMo - Sticky notes & Memo in any page
Add sticky notes on any page, move the sticky notes to any position on page. View all sticky notes in the extension options.

You can add sticky notes to any web page and move the sticky notes to anywhere on the page. 
Even if you restart the web page, the added memo will be displayed. 
You can set the fort size, marker, background color, etc. 
In the editor that edits the memo. You can check the added sticky notes list in the extension options.

■ Functions of sticky notes editor
 - Bold, italic, underline, strikethrough, fort size settings.
 - Marker color, text color, background color setting.
 - Delete memo, close editor, click OK button to complete editing sticky note.

■ Sticky notes display
 - Move notes by dragging and dropping.
 - If you hover your mouse over the lower right corner of the memo, 
   the size adjustment icon will be displayed and you can adjust the memo size.

■ Sticky notes list display page
 - When you press the menu "Show Notes List" of the Pegemo extension, the sticky notes list page is displayed.
 - A list of added memos is displayed on the option page of the Pegemo extension.
 - The added sticky notes and the target site are displayed on the sticky notes list page.
 - You can delete sticky notes with the trash can icon and delete sticky notes for each site.
 - You can access the target site of the added sticky notes from the list.

Allows you to right-click on any token on Dexscreener.com to check for potential rug pulls via RugCheck or De.Fi Scanner

Implements a simple context-menu available via right-click on Dexscreener.com that lets users perform various actions - primarily checking for rug pulls - more easily: rather than visiting the token details page and then copy-pasting token addresses, now one click is enough.

The menu is available via right-click and the current options are:

1) Check Token (for potential rug pulls)
2) Copy token address 
3) Copy token price 
4) Copy token information 
5) Copy token information in CSV format

Let's Compare - Same Product Less Money!
Let's Compare is a powerful all-in-1 shopping assistant which allows users to shop, compare and save items for future purchases.

Shopping online requires many hours spent toggling between various websites to get the best value for your money. It can become very tiring to memorize price after price in store after store. 

Now you can simplify your shopping experience.  All you need to shop hassle-free is the Let's Compare Google Chrome Extension.

In a single extension, buyers can easily compare offers on current items across multiple stores simultaneously to take advantage of the best offer.

Let's Compare is a powerful all-in-1 shopping assistant which allows users to shop, compare and save items for future purchases. It saves you time and money by utilizing cutting-edge technology while turning you into the ultimate savvy shopper.

Most importantly, Let's Compare is easily accessible and is saved in your browser window for quick use when the urge to shop arises. 

With Let's Compare customers get the best price for high-quality products without the stresses of shopping. 


 The Let's Compare Extension also has other nifty features such as: 

•	One Wishlist -Easily save your favorite items for later from thousands of stores, so you can purchase them when you're ready.

•	Get offers from multiple vendors such as Walmart and Amazon at the same time, related to your item



----------------------------------------------------

By using this add-on, you agree to the let's compare Terms & Conditions available at:
Privacy Policy - https://letscompare.deals/privacy/
Terms Of Use - https://letscompare.deals/terms/
